This '''firefight on Coruscant''' was a skirmish between [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] and two other [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].

==Background==
The origins of the fight began with [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] coming to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where he believed he would be able to contact [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. Fett entered a bar owned by [[Nan Mercador]]. Upon entering the bar, he was told that he should leave, as the bar was no place for children. Boba responded, that he was looking for Dooku, and was allowed to stay.

==The firefight==
After receiving a free drink, Boba allowed himself to relax, believing his mission a success. However, two [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]—a [[Diollan]] and a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]]—set upon him. Fett, however, tricked both of them, giving himself a chance to escape. [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] appeared before he could escape. She quickly stunned Nan and took Boba Fett to Dooku, who awarded Sing with Boba's [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: The Fight to Survive]]'' {{1st}}
